summary: Corrected the custom SOA endpoint path from /dns/soaRecord to /dns/soa.
reason: The authored spec guessed /dns/soaRecord, which returns HTTP 404. Confirmed via signed probe that /dns/soa returns 200. Spec + generated CLI/MCP/sync surfaces corrected; a future regen from the corrected spec reproduces this.
validated_outcome: Live: 'soa list' returns HTTP 200 (empty data) instead of 404.
